power-platform.description: Power Platform MCP server for StratAgent Brief. Provides access to Dataverse, Power Automate flows, and Copilot Studio agents in the RMAS environment.

setup_notes: 1. Verify Microsoft's Power Platform MCP server package name before use — the exact npm/dotnet package name may have changed since this template was created. Check https://learn.microsoft.com for current distribution.
2. Do NOT commit actual secrets to this file. Use environment variables (shown with ${VAR} syntax) or a .env file that is gitignored.
3. Create a dedicated AAD service principal for SAB development — do NOT reuse a user account, as MFA prompts will break headless Claude Code sessions.

4. Grant the service principal the minimum necessary permissions: read/write to the SAB solution, read on Marriott entities solution, read on the StratAgent solution (to inspect existing flows for reuse).
5. The first IT blocker to resolve is whitelisting api.anthropic.com through the SSL inspection proxy. Without that, Claude Code can't authenticate regardless of MCP config.
6. Test with 'claude mcp list' after config. Then probe with a prompt like 'list the solutions in my environment' to verify the MCP server can actually read from Dataverse.

env_var_sources.MARRIOTT_TENANT_ID: Azure AD tenant GUID — ask IT or pull from Entra ID admin center
env_var_sources.SAB_DATAVERSE_ENV_URL: e.g. https://orgXXXXXX.crm.dynamics.com — from Power Platform admin center
env_var_sources.SAB_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL_CLIENT_ID: Application (client) ID of the SAB service principal in Entra ID
env_var_sources.SAB_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL_CLIENT_SECRET: Client secret value — store in a secure location, not in repo

optional_additional_servers.description: If desired, add other MCP servers here. Examples commented out below — uncomment and configure as needed.

microsoft_learn.purpose: Search official Microsoft/Azure documentation from within Claude Code sessions. Useful when writing flows or debugging Copilot Studio topics.
